action_metadata.metadata_title: Withdraw 1,193,000 ada for Intersect Technical Steering Committee Support

onchain_context:
onchain recipient history: stake address stake1784sdxt6jjennmstphgdu7l7c2scf5d02a6cve2dgn5s2kq5u3j9v appears in 15 withdrawal proposals totalling 177273260000000 lovelace (first 2026-06-23 16:14:33, last 2026-07-09 16:30:25)
onchain DRep vote counts so far: yes=56 no=15 abstain=5 (explicit ballots, not stake-weighted)
treasury flow (36 epochs): inflow 158689112947739 lovelace, enacted withdrawals 291435336000000 lovelace, ratio 1.836518

fact_verdicts.note: Source Material 0 gives action id b3d452bff7769d7f557ec6b8974760ee6c5e496c276652b654032966621e0ccf#3, type TreasuryWithdrawals, the identical title, treasury amount 1193000000000 lovelace, proposed epoch 638, expires after 645. All five specifics match exactly.
Anchor authors[0].name = "Intersect" with witness.witnessAlgorithm = "ed25519" plus publicKey and signature; top-level hashAlgorithm = "blake2b-256".

Anchor motivation: "Intersect's Technical Steering Committee (TSC) requests $298,250 (1,193,000 ADA) to support activities for 12 months, spanning community engagement, protocol governance, and independent technical review." Quoted figure and framing are verbatim.
Anchor motivation closing note: "The execution of the work packages outlined in the proposal is contingent on the IntersectMBO budget proposal's approval."
Anchor body.onChain.gov_action.rewards[0] has key stake1784sdxt6jjennmstphgdu7l7c2scf5d02a6cve2dgn5s2kq5u3j9v and value "1193000000000". Stake address string matches character-for-character.

Source Material 1 states that stake address appears in 15 withdrawal proposals totalling 177273260000000 lovelace, first 2026-06-23 16:14:33, last 2026-07-09 16:30:25. Count, total, and both timestamps match.
Anchor Budget Summary table: WP 1 = 256,000; WP 2 = 832,000; WP 3 = 105,000; Total = 1,193,000. The three line items sum to the stated total, and the total matches the on-chain withdrawal amount.
Anchor motivation: "All expenditure will be fully accounted for and any unspent funds returned to the Cardano treasury."

Anchor rationale, Audit & Oversight: "Independent audits and assurance for this proposal will be provided by [Appold]" and "Reviews may include deliverable verification, control testing, spend validation, and assessment of milestone evidence where appropriate." Named entity and the four review activities all appear.
Anchor rationale: "Intersect will continue to operate milestone-based drawdowns, evidence-backed reporting, and transparent disclosures alongside this external assurance process."

Anchor Prior Treasury Funding Disclosure states the TSC has not received Cardano Treasury funding within the past 24 months, and the disclosure table lists 15,750,000 + 750,000 + 5,885,000 with a stated bolded total of 22,385,000 ada for Intersect and its committees. The line items sum to the stated total.

Anchor Net Change Limit Compliance section: the requested amount "does not at time of submission, on its own or in aggregate, breach the applicable [350M Net Change Limit]... covering Epoch 613 to Epoch 713." Cap size and both epoch bounds match.
Source Material 1: "onchain DRep vote counts so far: yes=56 no=15 abstain=5 (explicit ballots, not stake-weighted)". All three counts and the not-stake-weighted qualifier match.

Source Material 1: "treasury flow (36 epochs): inflow 158689112947739 lovelace, enacted withdrawals 291435336000000 lovelace, ratio 1.836518". Window, both magnitudes, and the ratio match digit-for-digit.

values_hierarchy.md ranks treasury stewardship and downside protection at #2, above evidence quality and reproducibility (#3) and public-benefit ecosystem growth (#4). treasury_spending_doctrine.md, Dossier Gate Posture: "Hard gate (current): incomplete independently verified diligence means NEEDS_MORE_INFO, never an automatic NO."

verification.summary: All 15 facts are supported by the supplied material. Every checkable number reconciles: the withdrawal amount (1193000000000 lovelace / 1,193,000 ADA) is consistent across the on-chain metadata, the anchor title, the anchor rewards entry, and the budget table, whose three work-package line items (256,000 + 832,000 + 105,000) sum exactly to the stated total. The prior-funding disclosure table's three governance actions (15,750,000 + 750,000 + 5,885,000) likewise sum to the stated 22,385,000 ADA. The recipient stake address in the dossier matches the anchor rewards key and the on-chain recipient-history record character-for-character, and the on-chain context figures (15 proposals / 177273260000000 lovelace; yes=56 no=15 abstain=5; 36-epoch inflow 158689112947739, enacted withdrawals 291435336000000, ratio 1.836518) are reproduced exactly. The two doctrine claims in fact 15 both track the doctrine text, including the NEEDS_MORE_INFO hard-gate language. No fact introduces a figure, name, date, or commitment absent from the material, so there are no material discrepancies. Note that this audit verifies only fidelity to the supplied sources — it does not test whether the proposal's own assertions (for example the Appold assurance arrangement or the NCL compliance claim) are true off-chain.
